name: Zernio
description: Unified social media API for posting, scheduling, account connection, analytics, inbox, comments, queues, and webhooks across X/Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube, Threads, Reddit, Pinterest, Bluesky, Telegram, Google Business, Snapchat, WhatsApp, and Discord.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Zernio API key from Settings > API Keys. Zernio keys usually start with sk_.

tools.name: list_profiles
tools.description: List Zernio profiles/workspaces available to this API key.

tools.name: create_profile
tools.description: Create a Zernio profile/workspace for grouping social accounts.

timezone.description: IANA timezone, for example Europe/Paris or America/New_York.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Get one Zernio profile by ID.

tools.name: update_profile
tools.description: Update a Zernio profile.

tools.name: delete_profile
tools.description: Delete a Zernio profile.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List connected social accounts. Use this before creating posts so each target platform includes its accountId.

tools.name: get_connect_url
tools.description: Create an OAuth connection URL for a social platform. The user should open the returned URL to connect an account.

profileId.description: Profile to attach the account to.

headless.description: Return data for a custom/headless connection flow when supported.

tools.name: complete_oauth_callback
tools.description: Complete a Zernio OAuth callback manually when using a headless/custom connect flow.

tools.name: get_pending_oauth_data
tools.description: Get pending account-selection data after an OAuth flow, for providers that require choosing a page, organization, location, board, or profile.

tools.name: list_facebook_pages
tools.description: List Facebook Pages available during a Zernio OAuth selection flow. Use profileId and tempToken returned by complete_oauth_callback or get_pending_oauth_data.

tools.name: select_facebook_page
tools.description: Complete a Facebook Zernio connection by selecting the Page to manage.

tools.name: list_linkedin_organizations
tools.description: List LinkedIn organizations available during a Zernio OAuth selection flow. Requires the tempToken and orgIds returned by the callback/pending OAuth data.

tools.name: select_linkedin_organization
tools.description: Complete a LinkedIn Zernio connection as either the personal profile or a selected organization page.

tools.name: list_pinterest_boards
tools.description: List Pinterest boards available during a Zernio OAuth selection flow.

X-Connect-Token.description: Short-lived connect token when returned by OAuth.

tools.name: select_pinterest_board
tools.description: Complete a Pinterest Zernio connection by selecting a board.

tools.name: list_snapchat_profiles
tools.description: List Snapchat public profiles available during a Zernio OAuth selection flow.

tools.name: select_snapchat_profile
tools.description: Complete a Snapchat Zernio connection by selecting a public profile.

tools.name: list_whatsapp_phone_numbers
tools.description: List WhatsApp phone numbers available during a Zernio OAuth selection flow.

tools.name: select_whatsapp_phone_number
tools.description: Complete a WhatsApp Zernio connection by selecting a phone number.

tools.name: list_googlebusiness_locations
tools.description: List Google Business Profile locations available during a Zernio OAuth selection flow.

tools.name: select_googlebusiness_location
tools.description: Complete a Google Business Profile Zernio connection by selecting a location.

tools.name: disconnect_account
tools.description: Disconnect a social account from Zernio.

tools.name: update_account
tools.description: Update a connected social account's settings in Zernio.

tools.name: move_account_to_profile
tools.description: Move a connected account to another Zernio profile.

tools.name: check_accounts_health
tools.description: Check health/auth status for connected accounts, optionally filtered by profile, platform, or status.

tools.name: check_account_health
tools.description: Check health/auth status for one connected social account.

tools.name: create_post
tools.description: Create, publish, queue, or schedule a social post. Use plain text, not Markdown. First call zernio-list-accounts and pass each target as {platform, accountId}. For YouTube, include title and platformSpecificData when needed; visibility defaults are provider-specific unless you set visibility/privacy explicitly.

title.description: Optional title, especially useful for YouTube, Reddit, Pinterest, and long-form video posts.

content.description: Post caption/text. Use plain text, not Markdown.

mediaItems.description: Attached media items. Each item can contain url, type, altText, thumbnailUrl, and provider-specific metadata.

platforms.description: Target platform/account pairs. Required for non-draft posts.

platformSpecificData.description: Provider-specific options such as YouTube category/privacy, Instagram post type, TikTok options, Reddit subreddit, Discord channel, etc.

scheduledFor.description: ISO 8601 publish time. Omit and set publishNow=true to publish immediately.

queuedFromProfile.description: Use the next available queue slot for this profile.

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: List posts managed by Zernio, with filters for account, profile, platform, status, dates, search, and sort.

sortBy.description: Sort field, for example createdAt, scheduledFor, or updatedAt.

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Get a post by ID.

tools.name: update_post
tools.description: Update a draft, queued, or scheduled Zernio post. For already published platform posts, use edit_published_post or update_post_metadata when supported.

tools.name: delete_post
tools.description: Delete a Zernio post record. This does not necessarily delete already published posts from every social network.

tools.name: retry_post
tools.description: Retry a failed Zernio post.

tools.name: unpublish_post
tools.description: Request unpublishing/removal of a published social post where the platform supports it.

tools.name: edit_published_post
tools.description: Edit a published post when Zernio/platform supports post-publication editing. Current OpenAPI support is limited to X/Twitter text edits.

tools.name: update_post_metadata
tools.description: Update platform metadata after publishing. Supports YouTube metadata including title, description, tags, category, privacy, and thumbnailUrl.

videoId.description: YouTube video ID for direct mode.

accountId.description: Zernio account ID for direct mode.

thumbnailUrl.description: Public URL of a custom thumbnail image.

tools.name: sync_external_posts
tools.description: Import or refresh recent posts from a connected account. Provide url or postId to sync one external post, or omit both to refresh recent posts for the account.

tools.name: bulk_upload_posts
tools.description: Bulk upload posts from CSV.

csvUrl.description: Public URL to the CSV file.

tools.name: get_media_upload_url
tools.description: Create a presigned media upload URL. Upload the media to the returned URL, then use the returned media URL/item when creating a post.

size.description: Optional file size in bytes. Zernio supports uploads up to 5GB where allowed by platform/provider.

tools.name: upload_media_direct
tools.description: Upload media directly to Zernio when the executor/source supports multipart or binary upload.

file.description: File/blob reference or multipart field, depending on executor support.

tools.name: get_analytics
tools.description: Get post analytics from Zernio.

tools.name: get_daily_metrics
tools.description: Get daily aggregated social metrics.

tools.name: get_follower_stats
tools.description: Get follower history/statistics for one or more accounts.

tools.name: get_youtube_channel_insights
tools.description: Get YouTube channel insights for a connected YouTube account.

tools.name: get_youtube_daily_views
tools.description: Get YouTube daily views for a video or account.

tools.name: get_facebook_page_insights
tools.description: Get Facebook Page insights for a connected Facebook account.

tools.name: get_instagram_account_insights
tools.description: Get Instagram account insights for a connected Instagram account.

tools.name: get_tiktok_account_insights
tools.description: Get TikTok account-level insights.

tools.name: get_best_time_to_post
tools.description: Get recommended best times to post based on connected-account analytics.

tools.name: list_conversations
tools.description: List unified inbox conversations across supported platforms.

tools.name: get_conversation
tools.description: Get a unified inbox conversation.

tools.name: list_conversation_messages
tools.description: List messages in a unified inbox conversation.

tools.name: send_inbox_message
tools.description: Send a reply/message in a unified inbox conversation.

attachment.description: Optional attachment payload supported by the target platform.

tools.name: create_conversation
tools.description: Start a new supported inbox conversation, for example X/Bluesky/Reddit/WhatsApp when allowed by platform rules.

tools.name: update_conversation
tools.description: Update a unified inbox conversation status/metadata.

status.description: Conversation status, for example open, archived, or closed.

tools.name: mark_conversation_read
tools.description: Mark a unified inbox conversation as read.

tools.name: list_commented_posts
tools.description: List posts with inbox comments.

tools.name: get_post_comments
tools.description: Get comments for a social post tracked by Zernio inbox.

tools.name: reply_to_comment
tools.description: Reply publicly to a comment on a tracked inbox post.

commentId.description: Parent comment ID when replying to a specific comment.

tools.name: hide_comment
tools.description: Hide a comment when supported by the platform.

tools.name: unhide_comment
tools.description: Unhide a previously hidden comment when supported by the platform.

tools.name: like_comment
tools.description: Like a comment when supported by the platform.

tools.name: unlike_comment
tools.description: Remove a comment like when supported by the platform.

tools.name: delete_comment
tools.description: Delete a comment when supported by the platform.

tools.name: private_reply_to_comment
tools.description: Send a private reply to a comment when supported by the platform.

tools.name: list_mentions
tools.description: List inbox mentions.

tools.name: list_reviews
tools.description: List inbox reviews, such as Google Business reviews.

tools.name: reply_to_review
tools.description: Reply to a review where supported.

tools.name: list_queue_slots
tools.description: List posting queue schedules.

all.description: Provider expects a string query flag.

tools.name: create_queue_slot
tools.description: Create a posting queue schedule.

tools.name: update_queue_slot
tools.description: Update a posting queue schedule.

tools.name: delete_queue_slot
tools.description: Delete a posting queue schedule.

tools.name: preview_queue
tools.description: Preview upcoming queue slots.

tools.name: get_next_queue_slot
tools.description: Get the next available queue slot.

tools.name: list_webhooks
tools.description: List Zernio webhook settings.

tools.name: create_webhook
tools.description: Create a Zernio webhook subscription.

tools.name: update_webhook
tools.description: Update a Zernio webhook subscription.

tools.name: delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete a Zernio webhook subscription.

tools.name: list_webhook_logs
tools.description: List Zernio webhook delivery logs.

tools.name: test_webhook
tools.description: Send a test event to a Zernio webhook endpoint.

events.name: post.platform.published
events.description: A post was published to a specific platform.

events.name: post.platform.failed
events.description: A post failed on a specific platform.

events.name: post.external.created
events.description: An external/social-network post was synced into Zernio.

events.name: message.received
events.description: A unified inbox message was received.

events.name: message.sent
events.description: A unified inbox message was sent.

registration.manual_setup: Zernio also supports webhook setup from the Zernio dashboard. Signatures use HMAC-SHA256 in X-Zernio-Signature when a secret is configured.
